stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft Operator within the EU wishes to apply for an AOC. Which of the following most accurately identifies the “Issuing Authority"?

options.a: It is the Competent Authority/ies of the Member States where the Operator flies.
options.b: It is EASA or the relevant Member State Competent Authority.
options.c: It is the International Civil Aviation Organisation (ICAO).
options.d: It is the aircraft Operator applying for the AOC.
